title: Croatian Flatbread
description: A traditional Croatian bread recipe with a garlic twist. Perfect for dipping in soups or olive oil.
instructions: Roll out the garlicky dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Cut the dough into desired shapes or sizes.
Place the flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
